entry.title: A1001 方修编著资料辑录 Compiled Works by Fang Xiu
entry.content:
方修1922年出生于潮州潮安县，1938年南来新加坡，是新加坡著名的文史学家、作家，更是新华文学的奠基人之一。本书由国家图书馆编辑出版，辑录方修主要著作和研究，并附上内容摘要和目录等基本信息供读者参考，为后人研究新华文学提供清晰的索引。

Fang Xiu was born in Teo Ann County, Teochew in 1922 and came to Singapore in 1938. He is a famous Singaporean historian, writer and one of the founders of Chinese literature in Singapore. The book edited and published by the National Library Board, compiles Fang Xiu’s major works and related research, and provides basic information such as content summaries and catalogs for readers’ reference, providing a clear index to study Chinese literature in Singapore.
分类 Catagory 索引 Index
主编 Editor-in-Chief 何炳彪 梁彗群 Ho Phang Phow, Liang Huiqun
出版单位 Publisher 新加坡国家图书馆 National Library Board
出版时间 Year of Publication 2008
目录 Content Page 点击查阅 Click to view
